Question: Determine whether the series $$\sum_{n = 1}^{\infty} ( n + 1 ) \text{/} n$$ converges or diverges.
Answer: The series diverges because the $$k \text{th}$$ partial sum $$S_{k} > k .$$

Question: Determine whether the series $$\sum_{n = 1}^{\infty} ( \frac{-2}{5} )^{n - 1}$$ converges or diverges. If it converges, find its sum.
Write $$5.2 \overset{-}{7}$$ as a fraction of integers.
Determine whether $$\sum_{n = 1}^{\infty} [ e^{1 \text{/} n} - e^{1 \text{/} ( n + 1 )} ]$$ converges or diverges. If it converges, find its sum.
